items.english: She found a new job last month.
items.translation: Она нашла новую работу в прошлом месяце.

items.english: I have a lot of work today.
He is building a successful career.
Teaching is a respected profession.
Please state your occupation in the form.
items.translation: Пожалуйста, укажите ваш род занятий в форме.

items.english: The employee completed the task on time.
The employer offered better conditions.
My colleague helped me with the project.
items.translation: Мой коллега помог мне с проектом.

items.english: The manager approved the plan.
The supervisor checked our progress.
She applied for a senior position.
items.translation: Она подала заявку на старшую должность.

items.english: His role in the company is important.
This role involves great responsibility.
It is my duty to report the results.
She completed every task efficiently.
He has five years of work experience.
items.translation: У него пять лет опыта работы.

items.english: This position requires specific qualifications.
Communication is an essential skill.
She has a strong professional background.
The salary is competitive.
Workers receive a fair wage.
His income increased this year.
items.translation: Его доход увеличился в этом году.

items.english: Employees received a yearly bonus.
The company offers good benefits.
My work schedule is flexible.
She works the night shift.
The workload is quite heavy this week.
items.translation: Рабочая нагрузка на этой неделе довольно высокая.

items.english: We must meet the deadline.
items.translation: Мы должны уложиться в крайний срок.

items.english: He works overtime on weekends.
She has a full-time job.
items.translation: У неё работа на полной занятости.

items.english: He works part-time during his studies.
items.translation: Он работает неполный день во время учёбы.

items.english: She works as a freelance designer.
They signed a two-year contract.
This is a temporary position.
The company plans to hire new staff.
They decided to fire the employee.
He decided to quit his job.
She received a promotion last year.
items.translation: Она получила повышение в прошлом году.

items.english: The demotion surprised everyone.
He updated his resume yesterday.
Please send your CV by email.
items.translation: Пожалуйста, отправьте своё резюме по электронной почте.

items.english: She prepared carefully for the interview.
There is a vacancy in the marketing department.
He submitted his application online.
Her expertise helped the team succeed.
items.translation: Её профессиональные знания помогли команде добиться успеха.

items.english: Health benefits are included in the package.
